stories.title: Review prompt improvement suggestions
stories.description: Add a focused internal review view for approved and rejected prompt improvement suggestions so Sopheap can decide what should become template work.
acceptanceCriteria: Approved, rejected, suggested, and implemented suggestions are easy to filter.
The view makes clear that suggestions do not update prompts automatically.
Internal margin or client-sensitive feedback is not exposed in client-facing surfaces.
stories.notes: Start with UI and storage behavior only. Do not change prompts in this story.

stories.title: Apply approved prompt template update
stories.description: Create a human-approved prompt template update path for one selected agent using approved improvement suggestions as source evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Only approved suggestions can be used.
The update is explicit, reviewable, and documented.
Tests cover the selected prompt/template behavior.
stories.notes: Human approval is required before implementing this story.

stories.title: Add prompt change audit log
stories.description: Add a lightweight audit log for prompt/template changes connected to approved suggestions.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit records capture suggestion id, target agent, summary, author, and timestamp.
Audit records do not include secrets.
Supabase schema and local fallback are documented.

stories.title: Rollback prompt version
stories.description: Design a simple rollback record for prompt/template changes so DG Academy can restore a previous version after a bad evaluation trend.
acceptanceCriteria: Rollback is documented as a human-approved action.
No rollback happens automatically from AI feedback.
The UI or docs explain what was restored and why.
stories.notes: This can start as docs and data model before UI.

stories.title: Add prompt optimization tests
stories.description: Add regression tests for prompt improvement suggestions, approval status, and template update safety rules.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests fail if unapproved suggestions are treated as implemented.
Tests cover quality metrics and improvement workflow behavior.
stories.notes: Prefer pure tests that do not require Supabase.
